Applied_Promoters.reason: Results state pii12 lacks a 19 bp segment upstream of the putative translation start site, and complementation used full-length OXI1 cDNA.

Interacting_Proteins.reason: PDK1 activation of OXI1 is supported from cited prior work and pathway inference; AGC2-2 is a homolog in the same pathway, not shown as a physical interactor; MPK6 is mentioned from prior work as a downstream target, not directly tested here.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: Results state oxi1/pii12 have reduced root hair lengths and fail to show fungal growth promotion.

Other_Important_Info.reason: All listed points are in paper: pii12 identified by EMS screen with upstream deletion, overexpressor/complemented lines behaved like wild type, and colonization of oxi1 was not impaired.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: This is a forward-looking application claim not directly evaluated in the paper, though developmental roles and lack of overexpression benefit are discussed.
